nodes.title: Heal Boost Calculation Engine
nodes.summary: Calculates healing multiplier from all applicable sources (perks, passives, rune effects). Applies a data-driven definition table of heal scaling sources, level-based healing, and conditional multipliers including Anti Heal self-debuff reduction. Returns per-source breakdowns and a combined final multiplier.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Map-based deduplication of scaling definitions, union-type constraints for HealSource, and conditional calcFn callbacks with early-return pattern.
nodes.languageLesson: Defines a HealBoostDef[] configuration array where each entry either provides a fixed multiplierPerPerk or a custom calcFn for complex conditions, iterating with Map.set for deduplication.

nodes.title: Rune Damage Definitions
nodes.summary: Defines all rune damage abilities in a declarative RUNE_DMG_DEFS array. Each rune entry specifies base damage (via imported constants), damage type distribution, scaling weights, hit counts, optional slider/shield mechanics, and healer-only classification. Includes a private calculateRuneHealScaling helper that delegates to HealBoost.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses imported constants from rune-base-damage.ts for all numeric values, interfaces with optional fields and callback-based dynamic computation (getHits, getBaseDamage).
nodes.languageLesson: Each RuneDmgDef uses a functional approach with getBaseDamage and getHits callbacks that receive a context object, enabling dynamic calculation based on runtime state.

nodes.title: Summon Unit Definitions and Utilities
nodes.summary: Provides summon stat calculation (calcSummonStat), summon cap computation (calcMaxSummonCount), and static definitions for summon units (Mage Bomber, Blessedling). Includes lookup maps (SUMMON_MAP, WA_SUMMON_MAP) and a Swarm perk definition for count augmentation.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Object.fromEntries for map construction from definition arrays, and Record types for strongly-typed lookup maps.
nodes.languageLesson: calcSummonStat applies a scaling formula: base * (1 + boostPct/100 * (1 + level/maxLevel)), rounding to two decimals.

nodes.title: Cooldown Reduction Perk Data
nodes.summary: Exports a CDR_PERK_DATA lookup table mapping perk names to their cooldown reduction effects on rune cooldowns and weapon art cooldowns. Supports fixed percentage reductions, multiplier-based scaling, set-cooldown overrides with filtering, and toggleable states.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Record<string, PerkCDREntry> with optional function-valued fields (runeMultiplier, waMultiplier) for dynamic CDR computation based on perk stack count.
nodes.languageLesson: Each PerkCDREntry can specify fixed percentages (runePct/waPct), stack-scaling functions, or set cooldown overrides (runeSetCD with runeFilter), enabling diverse CDR mechanics in one structure.

nodes.title: Defensive Perk DR Calculator
nodes.summary: Calculates active damage reduction (DR) from defensive perks (Barbskin, Stoneskin, Adaptive Plate, Vampire, Frenzy, Carapace, etc.) based on player state. Each perk has conditional activation rules (HP threshold, darkness, rage, mounting). Also computes defensive potency multiplier from Bastion Bless and Draconic Infusion.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses an array of DefensivePerkSource objects with dependsOn predicate callbacks, maxDrPct clamping, and a potencyCapped flag. Pattern: iterate definitions, filter by conditions, compute DR per active entry.
nodes.languageLesson: getActiveDefensivePerkSources accepts 8 boolean/numeric context parameters, iterating over DEFENSIVE_PERK_SOURCES and applying dependsOn predicates and HP threshold checks to determine active DR sources.

nodes.title: Draconic Guild Buff and Debuff Definitions
nodes.summary: Generates Draconic Infusion buffs and Dragon Claw/Bubble ability debuffs based on guild color and perk investment. Computes potency/duration multipliers from Draconic Blood perk stacks, maps color to specific effects (air=attack speed, fire=burn, hex=debuff potency, holy=healing, water=cleanse, earth=poise), and generates debuff pools for hex/fire ability types.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a Record<string, function> for color-specific effect description generation. Returns GrantedBuff[] arrays with typed sourceType discriminants.
nodes.languageLesson: getEffectiveDraconicInfusionPotency applies applyBuffPerkModifiers from BuffData to raw infusion buffs, producing the final potency value after perk-modifier adjustments.

nodes.title: Constants Barrel Re-export
nodes.summary: Barrel file that re-exports everything from the constants/index module. Serves as the public import path for all game constants throughout the codebase.
nodes.languageNotes: Single-line barrel re-export using 'export * from' syntax.
nodes.languageLesson: This pattern allows other modules to import from '../lib/constants' without knowing the internal directory structure of constants.

nodes.title: Rune Base Damage Constants
nodes.summary: Exports 29 numeric constants defining base damage values, hit counts, slider maximums, scaling coefficients, and hit-calculation parameters for all rune abilities (Ancient Cleric, Beenade, Boostshroom, Thunderous Charge, Sporeling Toss, Foot Dive, Caci, Cacitrops, Hex Web, Brainblast, Rocky Tail).
nodes.languageNotes: All exports are numeric const values with no runtime logic. Pure configuration file.
nodes.languageLesson: Groups related numeric constants by rune name with section comments, using SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE naming convention.

nodes.title: Toast Notification Store
nodes.summary: Svelte writable store for toast notifications. Provides addToast (creates a toast with auto-expiry via setTimeout) and removeToast (filters by ID). Toasts have an ID, message, type (success/error/info/warning), and optional duration.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Svelte writable store with update pattern for immutable state changes. Counter-based ID generation for unique toast identifiers.
nodes.languageLesson: addToast uses Svelte store's .update() with a spread-based immutable append pattern, and setTimeout for auto-removal with cleanup by ID.

edges.label: defensivePerks also uses draconic infusion — shared heal/DR subsystem
